brief_title: A Study Evaluating ANV600 Single Agent or in Combination with Pembrolizumab in Participants with Advanced Solid Tumors (EXPAND-1)
official_title: A First-in-human, Open-label, Multicenter Phase I/II Study to Evaluate the Safety and Anti-tumor Activity of ANV600 As Single Agent and in Combination with Pembrolizumab in Participants with Advanced Solid Tumors (EXPAND-1)
brief_summary: The purpose of study ANV600-001 is to characterize the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics (PK), pharmacodynamics, immunogenicity and antitumor activity of ANV600 administered as a single agent or in combination with pembrolizumab in adult participants with advanced solid tumors.

interventions.name: ANV600 + pembrolizumab (KEYTRUDA®)
interventions.description: ANV600 administered by intravenous (IV) infusion pembrolizumab (KEYTRUDA®) administered by intravenous (IV) infusion

primary_outcomes.measure: Phase I dose escalation: Incidence of Dose Limiting Toxicities (DLT) with ANV600 single agent and in combination with pembrolizumab combination with pembrolizumab
Phase I dose escalation: Frequency and severity of treatment-emergent adverse events (TEAEs) with ANV600 and in combination with pembrolizumab
Phase II: Objective Response Rate (ORR) using RECIST v1.1
Phase II: Duration of Response (DOR) using RECIST v1.1
